title: Project Intake & Onboarding
description: A premium multi-step project intake form for agencies and service teams. Fully editable in MegaForm Builder with schema-native fields and native page-break steps.

fields.label: Your Details
fields.heading: Let’s get to know you
fields.intro: Tell us who you are so we can personalise your experience.

fields.label: Project Overview
fields.heading: Tell us about your project
fields.intro: Share the high-level details so we can match you with the right team.

fields.label: Project Description
fields.placeholder: Describe your project, key challenges, and what success looks like…

fields.label: Scope & Budget
fields.heading: Scope, timeline & budget
fields.intro: Help us understand the scale of your project so we can put together the best proposal.

fields.label: We have existing brand assets (logo, guidelines, etc.)

options.label: We have existing brand assets (logo, guidelines, etc.)

fields.label: Finish Up
fields.heading: Almost there!
fields.intro: Add any files, extra notes, and rate how urgent this project is.

fields.label: Reference Files or Attachments
fields.hint: Upload briefs, mockups, or brand assets. Max 10 MB per file.

fields.label: Anything else we should know?
fields.placeholder: Competitor links, tech preferences, must-have features…

fields.label: I agree to be contacted regarding this project enquiry.

options.label: I agree to be contacted regarding this project enquiry.

customHtml:
New Enquiry

Project Intake & Onboarding

Complete the four steps below and our team will be in touch within one business day.

  1. 1 Contact Step 1 of 4
  2. 2 Project Step 2 of 4
  3. 3 Scope Step 3 of 4
  4. 4 Final Step 4 of 4

Let’s get to know you

Tell us who you are so we can personalise your experience.

{{field:email_address}}
{{field:phone_number}}
{{field:company_name}}

Tell us about your project

Share the high-level details so we can match you with the right team.

{{field:project_type}}
{{field:project_goals}}
{{field:project_description}}

Scope, timeline & budget

Help us understand the scale of your project so we can put together the best proposal.

{{field:project_budget}}
{{field:project_timeline}}
{{field:start_date}}
{{field:team_size}}
{{field:has_existing_assets}}

Almost there!

Add any files, extra notes, and rate how urgent this project is.

{{field:reference_files}}
{{field:project_urgency}}
{{field:additional_notes}}
{{field:consent_contact}}
